creator: Creator
media_item_delete_confirmation: This will clear this item from history. Are you sure you want to do this?
dictionaries_delete_confirmation: Deleting a dictionary will also clear all dictionary results from history. Are you sure you want to do this?
mappings_delete_confirmation: This profile will be deleted. Are you sure you want to do this?
catalog_delete_confirmation: This catalog will be deleted. Are you sure you want to do this?
import_duplicate: A dictionary with the name『$name』is already imported.
dialog_content_dictionary_clear: Wiping the dictionary database will also clear all search results in history.
dialog_content_dictionary_delete: Deleting a single dictionary may take longer than clearing the entire dictionary database. This will also clear all search results in history.
legalese:
A focused Japanese EPUB reader for Android.

Logo by suzy and Aaron Marbella.

hibiki is free and open source software. See the project repository for a comprehensive list of other licenses and attribution notices.
import_file_extension_invalid: This format expects files with the following extensions: $extensions
model_to_map: Card type to use for new profile
error_profile_name_content: A profile with this name already exists or is not valid and cannot be saved.
error_ankidroid_api_content:
There was an issue communicating with AnkiDroid.

Ensure that the AnkiDroid background service is active and all relevant app permissions are granted in order to continue.
error_model_missing_content:
The corresponding card type of the currently selected profile is missing.

The profile will be deleted, and the standard profile has now been selected in its place.
error_model_changed_content:
The number of fields of the card type corresponding to the selected profile has changed.

The fields of the currently selected profile have been reset and will require reconfiguration.
info_enhancements: Enhancements enable the automation of field editing prior to card creation. Pick a slot on the right of a field to allow use of an enhancement. Up to five right slots may be utilised for each field. The enhancement in the left slot of a field will be automatically applied in instant card creation or upon launch of the Card Creator.
info_actions: Quick actions allow for instant card creation and other automations to be used on dictionary search results. Actions can be assigned via the slots below. Up to six slots may be utilised.
no_more_available_enhancements: No more available enhancements for this field
stash_added_multiple: Multiple items have been added to the Stash.
stash_clear_description: All contents will be cleared. Are you sure?
stash_nothing_to_pop: No items to be popped from the Stash.
failed_online_service: Failed to communicate with online service
clear_dictionary_description: This will clear all dictionary results from history. Are you sure?
clear_search_description: This will clear all search terms for this history. Are you sure?
clear_creator_description: This will clear all fields. Are you sure?
info_fields: Fields are pre-filled based on the term selected on instant export or prior to opening the Card Creator. In order to include a field for card export, it must be enabled below as well as mapped in the current selected export profile. Enabled fields may also be collapsed below in order to reduce clutter during editing. Use the Clear button on the top-right of the Card Creator in order to wipe these hidden fields quickly when manually editing a card.
add_field_hint: Assign a field to this row
field_fallback_used: The $field field used $secondField as its fallback search term.
card_export_not_configured: Anki not configured. Open Anki settings and tap Fetch.
info_incognito_on: Incognito mode on. Dictionary, media and search history will not be tracked.
info_incognito_off: Incognito mode off. Dictionary, media and search history will be tracked.
exit_media_description: This will return you to the main menu. Are you sure?
clear_browser_description: This will clear all browsing data used in media sources that use web content. Are you sure?
local_media_directory_empty: Directory has no folders or video
player_option_drag_to_select: Use Drag to Select Subtitle Selection
player_option_tap_to_select: Use Tap to Select Subtitle Selection
player_option_blur_options: Set Blur Widget Color and Bluriness
player_option_blur_reset: Reset Blur Widget Size and Position
player_option_subtitle_always_above_bott: Always show subtitle above bottom bar area
no_current_media: Play or refresh media for lyrics
wrap_image_audio: Include image/audio HTML tags on export
clear_text_description: This will clear all received text. Are you sure?
close_connection_description: This will end the WebSocket connection and clear all received text. Are you sure?
silent_export_on: Cards will be exported directly without opening the editor.
silent_export_off: The card editor will open before exporting.
export_profile_empty: Your export profile has no set fields and requires configuration.
error_export_media_ankidroid: There was an error in exporting media to AnkiDroid.
error_add_note: There was an error in adding a note to AnkiDroid.
first_time_setup_description: Welcome to hibiki! Set your target language and a default profile will be tailored for you. You can change this later at anytime.
use_br_tags: Use line break tag instead of newline on export
tap_empty_hide_chrome: Tap empty area to hide controls
storage_permissions: Please grant the following permissions for exporting to AnkiDroid.
network_subtitles_warning: Embedded subtitles are unsupported for network streams.
accessibility: Permission is required to capture text from accessibility events.
clear_message_description: This will clear all messages and start a new chat. Are you sure?
error_chatgpt_response: Request failed or rate-limited. Try again shortly or check your usage limits.
name: Name
duplicate_catalog: A catalog with this URL already exists.
invalid_mokuro_file: File is not a Mokuro generated HTML file.
field_locked: $field locked and will not clear on export while Creator is active.
field_unlocked: $field unlocked and will clear on export.
processing_embedded_subtitles: Embedded subtitles are processing. Try again later.
structured_content_first: $i definitions are unsupported and were omitted.
structured_content_second: Consider a non-structured content version of this dictionary.
chatgpt_error: There was an error in getting a response from ChatGPT.
server_port_in_use: Local server port already in use
design_system_hint: Controls the visual style of the app
info_standard_update_content:
The standard profile now uses the『hibiki Kinomoto』 card type.

Your legacy standard profile remains available for backwards compatibility.
video_unavailable_content: Cannot fetch streams. There may be restrictions in place that prevent watching this video.
video_file_error_content: Unable to load the video file. Please ensure this file exists and is located in a directory accessible by the application.
srt_import_pick_srt: Pick Subtitle File (combinable with EPUB & audio)
srt_no_subtitle_files: No subtitle files found in selected directory
srt_import_missing_input: Please pick at least an EPUB or subtitle file
srt_import_audio_needs_subtitle: Audio must be paired with subtitles. To attach audio to an existing EPUB, long-press the book on the shelf.
srt_no_audio_files: No audio files in selected directory
image_pause_hint: Auto-pause when an image appears during playback.
srt_audio_unresolved: Audio file not found — please re-attach
follow_audio_paused: Follow audio paused (user turned page manually)
floating_lyric_hint: Show current sentence over other apps.
av_sync_hint: Positive = audio ahead of text, shifts cue back; Negative = audio behind.
tap_seek_hint: Tap a sentence to jump audio to that position.
ttu_text_justify_hint: Stretch lines to fill the full width of the column.
ttu_vert_kerning_hint: Adjust spacing between CJK characters for vertical text.
ttu_font_vpal_hint: Use proportional alternates for punctuation in vertical layout.
ttu_reader_styles_hint: Use the book's built-in CSS instead of reader defaults.
ttu_vert_text_orient_hint: Mixed: rotate Latin; Upright: keep all characters upright.
ttu_not_bound_cannot_rematch: Book not bound to ttu, cannot re-match
sasayaki_no_sections: No ttu chapter text found, cannot auto-match
sasayaki_all_zero: All windows scored 0%, please adjust manually
sasayaki_window_hint: Number of characters to search forward per cue in the text. Adjust if hit rate is low; too large may skew cursor with short noisy cues.
sasayaki_threshold_hint: Minimum similarity for fuzzy matching (Dice coefficient). Lower to tolerate more text differences, but too low causes false matches.
auto_select_search_window_hint: Probe multiple window sizes on import, pick the one with the best hit rate
custom_fonts_no_fonts_in_archive: No font files found in archive
audio_source_dns_error: Audio source connection failed: cannot resolve "${host}" — check your network, or remove this source in settings
audio_source_timeout: Audio source timeout: "${host}" — server not responding, try again later or change source
anki_default_deck_hint:
Cards will be added to this deck by default when exporting from the card creator.
To create a new deck, please create it in AnkiDroid first.
anki_default_profile_hint:
Determines which card type and field mapping to use when exporting cards to AnkiDroid.
You can manage export profiles in the card creator.
anki_silent_export_hint: Export cards directly without opening the card editor.
anki_auto_tag_hint: Automatically add the current book title as a tag when creating cards.
anki_duplicate_check_hint: Select which Anki card types to check for duplicates before adding a new card.
anki_tags_hint: Space-separated tags added to every card
anki_allow_duplicates_hint: Skip duplicate check when adding cards
anki_compact_glossaries_hint: Use compact format for glossary entries
hint_font_size: Adjust the font size of the book text (in pixels).
hint_line_height: Adjust the spacing between lines of text. Larger values increase readability.
hint_text_indentation: Number of characters to indent the first line of each paragraph.
hint_margin: Outer margin around the reading area (in pixels).
hint_max_width_height: Maximum width (horizontal) or height (vertical) of the reading area. Set to Auto for full screen.
hint_page_columns: Number of columns per page. Set to Auto to let the reader decide based on screen size.
hint_writing_direction: Horizontal: left-to-right text flow. Vertical: traditional top-to-bottom, right-to-left Japanese text.
hint_view_mode: Paginated: flip pages like a book. Continuous scroll: scroll through text without page breaks.
hint_vert_text_orient: Mixed: numbers and Latin letters are rotated sideways. Upright: all characters stay upright.
anki_manage_profiles_hint: Configure how card fields are mapped when exporting to AnkiDroid. Each profile binds to an Anki note type and defines which hibiki field fills each Anki field.
font_desc_klee_one: Handwritten textbook style · Clear and legible · Pairs well with Noto Sans JP fallback
font_desc_noto_sans_jp: Google/Adobe Gothic · Japanese glyphs priority · Variable weight
font_desc_noto_serif_jp: Google/Adobe Serif · Japanese glyphs priority · Ideal for vertical reading
font_desc_noto_sans_sc: Google/Adobe Gothic · Simplified Chinese glyphs priority · Use as fallback with Japanese fonts
font_desc_noto_serif_sc: Google/Adobe Serif · Simplified Chinese glyphs priority · Use as fallback with Japanese fonts
font_desc_noto_sans_tc: Google/Adobe Gothic · Traditional Chinese glyphs priority
font_desc_shippori_mincho: Elegant Mincho typeface · Great for literature · Pairs well with Noto Sans JP fallback
font_desc_zen_old_mincho: Vintage Mincho typeface · Classical literature style · Pairs well with Noto Sans JP fallback
font_desc_zen_maru_gothic: Soft rounded Gothic · Pairs well with Noto Sans JP fallback
font_desc_mplus_rounded_1c: Rounded cute style · Ideal for light novels · Pairs well with Noto Sans JP fallback
font_desc_hina_mincho: Soft decorative Mincho · Pairs well with Noto Sans JP fallback
font_desc_zen_kaku_gothic_new: Modern Kaku Gothic · General reading · Pairs well with Noto Sans JP fallback
anki_export_not_implemented: Anki export is not yet implemented on this platform.
icon_custom_confirm_body: This will create a home screen shortcut with your chosen image. Continue?
icon_custom_hint: Tap an icon to switch, or pick a custom image below.
icon_shortcut_unsupported: Shortcuts are not supported on this device.
book_css_editor_confirm_reset: Reset CSS for this file to default?
book_css_editor_confirm_reset_all: Reset CSS for ALL files to default?
book_css_editor_no_css_files: No CSS files found in this book.
book_css_editor_no_extract_dir: Book directory not found. Re-import the book to edit CSS.
book_css_editor_unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
floating_lyric_permission_hint: Overlay permission is required to display floating lyrics.
lyrics_font_size_hint: Lyrics font size is independent of book mode
lyrics_mode_hint_body: Lyrics mode has its own font size setting. You can adjust it in ⚙ Settings → Typography.
low_memory_mode_hint: Reduce cache and memory usage for low-end devices. Some changes take effect after restart.
low_memory_mode_suggestion: Try enabling Low Memory Mode in Settings → Miscellaneous.
srt_import_hint_epub_or_srt: Pick an EPUB or subtitle file to import.
tag_already_on_book: Tag "$name" is already on this book.
tag_name_duplicate: A tag with this name already exists.
tag_no_books_for_filter: No books match the selected tags.
tag_no_tags_hint: No tags yet. Create one to get started.
batch_delete_confirm: Delete $n book(s)? This cannot be undone.
update_debug_channel_warning: Debug channel builds may be unstable. Use at your own risk.
no_matching_audio_cue: No matching audio for this sentence
sync_exit_warning: Sync is still in progress. Exiting now may cause data loss.
sync_content_warning: Large files will use storage space and data
reader_content_timeout: Content loading timed out. Reopen if display is abnormal
backup_export_hint: Save all settings, reading progress, and statistics to a file
backup_import_hint: Restore from a backup file. The app will restart.
backup_import_confirm:
This will replace all current data with the backup from $date.

$bookCount books, $statsCount statistics records.

The app will restart after restore.
backup_schema_newer: This backup requires a newer version of the app (schema $version). Please update first.
shortcut_reset_confirm: Reset all shortcuts in this section to defaults?
sync_err_network: Cannot reach the server — check your network or proxy settings.
sync_err_timeout: Connection timed out — the server did not respond in time.
sync_err_auth_expired: Sign-in expired — please sign in again.
sync_server_port_in_use: Port $port is already in use — pick a different port.
sync_lan_scan_failed: Scan failed — check network permissions or firewall.
sync_section_host_server: This device as a sync server
sync_section_host_server_footer: Let other devices sync from this device. Independent of the sync backend above.
backup_import_preserve_sync_note: Your sync settings on this device (account and credentials) will be kept.
backup_import_settings_on_hint: Full restore: fonts, appearance and profiles come from the backup.
backup_import_settings_off_hint: Keep this device's fonts/appearance/profiles; restore only books & reading data.
reader_unsupported_platform: The reader is not yet available on this platform.
microphone_permission_denied: Microphone permission is required to record.
anki_connect_api_key_hint: Leave empty unless AnkiConnect requires a key
app_ui_scale_hint: Scales the whole interface — text, icons and controls together — from 30% to 300%. Increase it if the UI looks small on large screens.
sync_dictionary_warning: Dictionary packages can be large and include imported dictionary resources.
remote_dict_lookup_hint: When local dictionaries miss, query the configured Hibiki server
audio_source_url_invalid: Link must be http(s) and contain a term or reading placeholder
local_audio_no_sources: No sources found in this database
sync_pair_request_body: A device is requesting to pair. Allow it to sync with this device?
sync_pair_unavailable: The other device isn't ready or is on an older version. Update it and enable sync, then try again.
sync_role_locked_by_server: This device is hosting as a server. Turn off the server before connecting to other devices.
sync_role_locked_by_client: Already connected to another device. Remove the connection before hosting as a server.
sync_compare_unavailable: Set up a sync backend first
sync_audiobook_files_warning: Audio and subtitles can be large.
book_import_duplicate_message: A book named "$name" already exists. Import it anyway? "Yes" imports with a numbered suffix; "No" cancels.
sync_now_hint: Run a full two-way sync with the cloud now
sync_compare_delete_confirm: Delete "$name" from the remote? Local data is kept. This cannot be undone.
sync_local_audio_warning: Syncs local audio source databases (may be large)
video_import_subtitle_optional: Optional external subtitle (you can switch between embedded/external subtitles anytime during playback)
video_setting_av_delay_hint: Positive = subtitle later (cues pushed back); negative = subtitle earlier. Use the slider, +/- buttons, or type a value.
sync_compare_no_content: Cloud data only — no book to download
anki_create_lapis_hint: Adds the Lapis note type and a Lapis deck to Anki, then selects them.
anki_create_lapis_success: Lapis note type and deck created.
anki_create_lapis_exists: Lapis note type and deck already exist — selected them.
video_import_folder_empty: No video files found in this folder
video_setting_shaders_hint: Apply mpv GLSL shaders (e.g. Anime4K). Desktop only.
video_jimaku_api_key_hint: Get a free API key at jimaku.cc/account
video_jimaku_no_key: Enter your Jimaku API key first
video_shader_anime4k_hint: Pick a preset to download. After downloading, tick it in the list to enable. Desktop only.
video_shader_preset_mode_a_fast: For most 1080p anime. Lighter GPU load.
video_shader_preset_mode_b_fast: For older 720p anime with resampling artifacts.
video_shader_preset_mode_c_fast: For old SD (480p) anime with compression smearing.
video_shader_preset_mode_a_hq: Highest quality for 1080p anime. Needs a strong GPU.
video_subtitle_load_failed: Couldn't load this subtitle (graphic or unsupported track): $label
drag_drop_need_card_target: Drop subtitles or audio onto a book or video
sync_server_mode_active: This device is a sync server
sync_server_mode_clients_drive: Connected clients start the sync — no manual sync needed here.
video_setting_subtitle_blur_hint: Hide subtitles by default; hover or tap to reveal for listening practice.
video_setting_mpv_raw: Extra mpv options (one per line, key=value)
video_setting_mpv_raw_hint: Desktop only; options that cannot apply at runtime (e.g. vo, profile) are ignored. SVP/RIFE need external tools and are not supported.
log_upload_consent_body: The log text (which may include error messages, file paths, and book titles) plus your app version, platform, and device model will be uploaded to the developer's server to help diagnose issues. This only happens when you tap upload — nothing is sent automatically.
texthooker_enabled_hint: Connect to Textractor/mpv/agent and look up incoming text
yomitan_api_server_hint: Let yomitan-api clients query Hibiki's dictionaries (port 19633)
desktop_clipboard_enabled_hint: Watch clipboard + global hotkey to pop a lookup window (desktop)
texthooker_experimental_banner: Texthooker is experimental — live text, lookup and card creation may be unstable.
db_downgrade_message: This database was created by a newer version of Hibiki (schema v$dbVersion). Your current app is too old (v$appVersion). Opening was blocked to protect your data. Please update the app and try again.
video_subtitle_graphic_hint: Graphic subtitle · shown on video · no word lookup
video_subtitle_graphic_shown: Graphic subtitle shown on video (no word lookup): $label
focus_navigation_enabled_hint: Move focus with arrow keys or a gamepad and show a focus ring.
video_shader_mpv_dir_empty: No shaders found in that folder
video_shader_preset_mode_b_hq: High quality for older 720p anime with resampling artifacts. Needs a strong GPU.
video_shader_preset_mode_c_hq: High quality for old SD (480p) anime with compression smearing. Needs a strong GPU.
floating_lyric_click_lookup: Tap floating subtitle to look up
floating_lyric_click_lookup_hint: Keep this on with position lock if you still want word lookup.
desktop_clipboard_window_mode_hint: Controls whether Hibiki stays above other windows. Only watches the clipboard and global hotkey on the lookup tab.
popup_instant_scroll_hint: Jump the lookup popup by fixed distances without animated scrolling for e-ink screens.
remote_video_load_failed: Could not load paired device videos
remote_book_load_failed: Could not load paired device books
video_drop_audio_unsupported: Drop subtitle files onto the current video. Audio files cannot be attached here.
video_quality_enhancement_hint: Turn this on to sharpen the picture with mpv's built-in high-quality scaling. Works for anime as well as live-action shows and movies. To go further with shaders like Anime4K, open Image enhancement while a video is playing and pick a level there.
video_shader_builtin_mpv_quality_hint: Default mpv scaling options. External shaders below are still downloaded and enabled separately.
video_shader_import_from_mpv_hint: Search local mpv automatically, or choose an mpv folder when none is found.
video_shader_first_use_body: For sharper anime playback, open Image enhancement and click Download Anime4K presets. It downloads recommended shaders, then you can tick the installed ones to enable them.
sync_err_invalid_client: Client credentials are invalid for this build — please update the app.
sync_err_not_configured: Google sync credentials are not configured in this build.
floating_lyric_unavailable_hint: Could not show the floating subtitle window.
video_shader_tier_off_hint: No enhancement. Plays the original video as-is.
video_shader_tier_low_hint: mpv built-in sharpening (ewa_lanczossharp). Works on any video (animation and live-action). No download, lowest GPU load. Pick this on integrated or older cards (NVIDIA GTX 1050, AMD RX 560, Intel iGPU).
video_shader_tier_medium_hint: Anime4K Fast. Best for animation, but also works on live-action movies/TV (smaller gain). Runs on mid-range GPUs (NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX 3050, AMD RX 6600).
video_shader_tier_high_hint: Anime4K HQ. Sharper; best for animation, also usable on live-action (smaller gain). Needs an upper-mid GPU (NVIDIA RTX 4060 / RTX 3070, AMD RX 6700 XT / RX 7700 XT).
video_shader_tier_ultra_hint: ArtCNN C4F32 DS (denoise + sharpen). Best quality for HD animation and tuned for web-encoded sources (removes compression artifacts, light sharpening); also usable on live-action (smaller gain). Needs a flagship GPU (NVIDIA RTX 4080 / RTX 5090, AMD RX 7900 XTX). Pick a lower tier if your GPU is weaker.
video_shader_tier_custom_hint: Custom shader selection. Pick a tier above to switch to a preset.
video_shader_mobile_perf_hint: On phones, shaders apply only on the standard GPU render path and effectiveness varies by device GPU; higher tiers may drop frames or heat up. Try Low/Medium first and check the result on your device.
video_subtitle_attach_playlist_hint: Open the playlist to attach a subtitle per episode
video_brightness_unsupported: Brightness control not available on this platform
video_subtitle_color_note: Subtitle colors are set inside the video player.
theme_seed_preview_hint: Swatches below preview the colors actually generated from your seed. To force a specific color as the primary accent, turn on the Primary toggle and pick it explicitly.
backup_export_categories_hint: Selected categories are packed into the backup. The database (books, statistics, favorites, profiles, settings) is always included.
popup_bottom_docked_hint: Pin the lookup popup as a full-width panel at the bottom of the screen instead of following the looked-up word.
anki_tag_include_hibiki_hint: Mark every card mined by Hibiki
video_setting_picture_fit_hint: How the picture fills the player area
video_setting_picture_fit_contain: Fit keep ratio add black bars
video_setting_double_tap_hint: Double-tap the left or right of the video to seek
video_setting_immersive_mode_hint: Controls what remains available after pressing the side lock button
startup_default_dictionary_tab_hint: Start the home screen on the lookup tab instead of the current default.
video_setting_danmaku_enabled_hint: Render local or matched danmaku over the video without blocking controls.
video_setting_danmaku_online_hint: When no usable local sidecar exists, match the opened video with Dandanplay and fetch related comments.
video_setting_danmaku_max_active_hint: Caps comments rendered per frame to keep large files responsive.
video_setting_long_press_speed_hint: Temporarily use this speed while holding the video.
video_subtitle_list_select_for_card: Select for card (merged into the sentence when mining)
anki_error_collection_unavailable: AnkiDroid's collection is currently unavailable. Open AnkiDroid at least once, make sure it isn't syncing and the API is enabled, then retry.
video_bottom_prev_cue: Previous subtitle (back a bit if none)
video_bottom_next_cue: Next subtitle (forward a bit if none)
audio_clip_failed: Couldn't extract the audio clip — the audio source may be missing or unreadable
floating_lyric_no_audio: This book has no audio to listen to
lyrics_text_color_hint: Use a custom color for lyrics text instead of following the theme
floating_lyric_text_opacity_hint: Lower this to make the floating subtitle text more transparent
floating_lyric_button_bg_opacity_hint: Adjust how transparent the floating subtitle control buttons are
video_control_customize_hint: Choose where each button sits on the player, or move it out.
popup_append_sentence_tooltip: Add this sentence to the card
anki_not_configured: Tap Refresh to load your Anki decks and note types.
anki_refresh_hint: After creating or renaming a deck or note type in Anki, tap here to refresh.
video_control_palette_hint: Drag a button into a slot to add it; a button can sit in several slots.
video_clip_export_remote_download_requir: Download the remote video to this device before exporting a clip
video_clip_export_source_changed: Video source changed; clip export cancelled
update_install_incomplete_message: The installer started, but Hibiki is still on the previous version. Check the installer log below.
update_install_launch_failed_message: Hibiki could not start the installer for version $version. Check the log path below.
update_install_log_observed: Installer log was created during the post-launch check.
update_install_log_not_observed: Installer log was not created during the post-launch check.
video_control_reject_required: Required controls must stay on the player.
video_control_reject_volume_bottom: Volume can only sit on the bottom bar.
video_control_reject_unavailable: This control cannot be placed there.
update_install_manual_close_retry: Close Hibiki from the listed PID/path, then retry the update or run the installer again.
update_install_restart_windows_hint: If the listed processes are closed but libmpv-2.dll is still locked, restart Windows and install again.
shortcut_conflict_replace_confirm: This shortcut is already used by $s. Move it to this action?
drag_drop_unsupported_on_books: Drop book files here. Switch to Video or Dictionaries for those files.
drag_drop_unsupported_on_video: Drop videos, playlists, or subtitles here. Switch to Books or Dictionaries for those files.
drag_drop_unsupported_on_dictionary: Drop .zip, .dsl, or .mdx dictionary files here. CSS files only work together with a dictionary package.
video_drop_subtitle_only: Drop subtitle files onto the current video.
update_install_parent_exit_observed: Hibiki exited before the installer was launched.
update_install_parent_exit_not_observed: The update launcher did not observe Hibiki exiting before the installer launch.
video_control_reset_layout_hint: Restore moved and removed buttons to the default player layout.
floating_lyric_bg_opacity_hint: Lower this to make the floating subtitle bar more transparent so it blocks less of your view
dict_update_none: All dictionaries are up to date.
crash_dump_privacy_notice: Crash dumps (.dmp) contain a snapshot of process memory and may include text you were reading, words you looked up, or other in-app data. Share them only with developers you trust.
anki_overwrite_scope_hint: Which already-made cards the green ✓ can overwrite
video_setting_auto_play_next_hint: Automatically play the next episode in a playlist when one finishes
video_subtitle_auto_align_low_confidence: Couldn't confidently auto-align (no clear voice match)
audiobook_background_play_hint: When off, audiobook playback stops when you leave the reader. Turn on to keep playing in the background.
remote_book_audiobook_download_failed: Could not download audiobook for this book
anki_error_connection_refused: Could not connect to Anki: connection refused. Make sure Anki Desktop is running and the AnkiConnect add-on is installed.
anki_error_connection_timeout: Could not connect to Anki: the connection timed out. Check the host, port, and firewall settings.
anki_error_http: Could not export to Anki: an HTTP error occurred while contacting AnkiConnect.
anki_error_connection_unknown: Could not export to Anki: an unexpected connection error occurred. See the error log for details.
compress_mining_media_hint: Off keeps card media sharper but larger
hover_auto_lookup_hint: Look up automatically when the mouse hovers over a character; no need to click or hold Shift. Triggers at most one popup layer. Desktop only.
popup_dictionary_columns_hint: Show multiple dictionaries side by side; use fewer columns on narrow screens
card_exported_audio_failed: Card exported, but the audio failed to download ($reason).
card_mined_without_sentence_audio: Card created without sentence audio (none found for this selection).
card_cover_degraded_to_static: Card cover fell back to a still frame (animated clip unavailable): $reason
